channel.title: Damini More — AI Workflow Insights
channel.description: Thoughts on AI automation, RAG systems, and no-code tools by Damini More.

item.title: LangChain, LangGraph & LlamaIndex: The AI Developer Toolkit Explained
item.description: When to use LangChain, LangGraph, or LlamaIndex for building AI agents and RAG systems — a practical comparison from someone who has used all three in production.

item.title: Agentic AI & AI Agents: The Future of Workflow Automation
item.description: What are AI agents and agentic AI? How do they differ from simple LLM calls? A practical breakdown of autonomous AI systems, multi-agent pipelines, and generative AI automation in real workflows.

item.title: LLMs & RAG Explained: How I Use Them to Build Smarter AI Workflows
item.description: A practical guide to Large Language Models and Retrieval-Augmented Generation — what they are, how they work together, and how I use them to build production AI workflows at NITI.AI.

item.title: Top 5 No-Code Automation Tools I Use Daily
item.description: A hands-on comparison of Make.com, n8n, Pucho.ai, Lindy.ai, and Activepieces for building AI-powered workflows — with real pros, cons, and use cases.

item.title: How I Built 400+ AI Workflows with RAG & No-Code Tools
item.description: Lessons from automating CRM, email, and productivity pipelines at NITI.AI using Pucho.ai, LLMs, RAG, and agentic systems.
